reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Para viajar tranquilo es conveniente repostar combustible aqui y si viaja en fines de semana es posible disfrutar de su restoran que lamentablemente no abre todos los días y tienen una muy buena mesa.

(Translated by Google)
For a worry-free trip, it's convenient to refuel here, and if you're traveling on weekends, you can enjoy their restaurant, which unfortunately isn't open every day, but they have a very good table.
